question: What is your renovation process?
answer: Our process has five steps: (1) Free Consultation — we visit your home, assess the space, and discuss your vision and budget. (2) Design and Scope — we finalize the design, material selections, and detailed scope of work. (3) Fixed-Price Estimate — you receive a written quote with no hidden fees. Once approved, we handle permits. (4) Build — our licensed crew executes the project on schedule with daily updates and a dedicated project manager. (5) Final Walkthrough — we walk through the completed work with you, address any touch-ups, and hand over a clean, finished space. You only pay the final balance after you are satisfied.
